slide1.title: Love Knows No Borders or Status
slide1.subtitle: Serving HIV/AIDS patients, vulnerable migrant workers, and their children, providing a warm haven.

slide2.title: Helping Children Grow Up Safely
slide2.subtitle: Giving children a home, a shoulder to lean on, and a hope for the future.

mission.label: OUR MISSION
mission.title: Reaching out to the most vulnerable in society

card1.title: HIV/AIDS Care
card1.desc: Providing basic life support, holistic development guidance, and empowerment programs for those affected by HIV/AIDS.

card2.title: Migrants & Children
card2.desc: Caring for vulnerable migrant women and their children, providing a safe environment for childbirth and early childhood.

card3.title: Harmony Home
card3.desc: Promoting friendly community interaction, eliminating disease stigma, and allowing everyone to live with dignity.

volunteer.label: GET INVOLVED
volunteer.title: Join Us, Become the Power of Love
volunteer.desc: Whether through volunteering, donating supplies, or corporate partnership, every bit of your strength can bring change to those in need.
volunteer.point2: Donating: Diapers, milk powder, daily needs

donation.title: Every bit of your donation,
donation.titleAccent: is the power of a warm family
donation.desc: Your support will be directly used to provide placement, medical care, nutrition support, and holistic family care services.

modal.title: Donate Now
modal.subtitle: Please choose your donation method

method2.title: Bank Transfer / Postal
method2.desc: Please provide receipt details after transfer

modal.footer: According to law, every donation can be issued a receipt for income tax deduction. For inquiries, please call +1 (742) 371-9123.

footer.brandDesc: Founder Ms. Yang Jie-yu started caring services in 1986, a commitment across ethnic groups and illnesses.
